ops.body: Context: shipped in commit 7102353e90b9 (feat(exec): cache MCP discovery per project; gate reflection on script content). The probe child is spawned at internal/codeexec/discover.go Discover() — SIGTERM via cmd.Cancel + 2s WaitDelay kill targets only the claude PID; descendants of a TERM-ignoring child survive. Fix shape: Setpgid + kill(-pgid) behind platform build tags.
